title: Flea Treatment in Floral Park | Best Pest Control NYC | $350 – $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Floral Park, Long Island. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Floral Park home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services tailored to the unique needs of Long Island properties. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your space is safe and comfortable again.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Floral Park and the surrounding Long Island communities, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with advanced treatment methods. We offer transparent pricing ($350 – $650), same-day service options, and a satisfaction guarantee that keeps your property flea-free.
localContext: Floral Park's tree-lined streets, beautiful parks like Centennial Gardens, and mix of historic homes and modern residences create the perfect environment for pets and families—but also for flea problems. Whether you live near the Belmont Park border or in one of the charming Tudor-style homes throughout the village, our team understands the specific pest challenges facing Floral Park properties.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Floral Park range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets fleas at all life stages, including eggs and larvae. We offer follow-up treatments if needed to ensure complete eradication.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and family members out of treated areas for 2-4 hours during application, after which it's completely safe to return. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions during service.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand that flea infestations require urgent attention. Best Pest Control NYC offers same-day and emergency services throughout Floral Park and Long Island. Contact us before noon for potential same-day treatment availability.
